## Summary

- What does this PR change?
- Who is the intended user or operator?

## Motivation

- Why is this change needed?

## User-Facing Impact

- [ ] No user-facing behavior change
- [ ] Changes behavior for existing users
- [ ] Adds a new capability
- [ ] Docs need to be read by adopters

## Changes

- [ ] Code changes
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] README or docs updated
- [ ] Deployment or migration notes included if needed

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Manual validation performed when relevant

## Notes

- Risks, follow-up tasks, screenshots, or migration notes
